info.name: Tech Challenge - Collection
info.description: Collection unica para rodar os cenarios principais no Postman Runner: health, autenticacao Basic Auth, REST, GraphQL, erros HTTP e notification-service. Importe tambem o environment Tech-Challenge.postman_environment.json, selecione o environment e clique em Run collection.

item.name: 01 - Autenticação Basic Auth
item.description: Basic Auth não possui endpoint de login/token. Estes requests validam se as credenciais conseguem acessar rotas protegidas.

item.name: Login correto - médico acessa rota protegida 200
Login correto - enfermeiro acessa rota protegida 200
Login correto - paciente acessa próprio histórico 200
Listar todas as consultas como médico 200
03 - Perfis e permissões REST
item.description: Cenários por perfil. Médicos e enfermeiros executam operações clínicas; pacientes só consultam dados próprios.

body.raw:
{
  "patientId": "{{patientId}}",
  "professionalId": "{{professionalId}}",
  "professionalName": "{{professionalName}}",
  "scheduledAt": "{{doctorProfileScheduledAt}}",
  "status": "SCHEDULED",
  "notes": "Criada por médico para teste de perfil"
}

{
  "patientId": "{{patientId}}",
  "professionalId": "{{professionalId}}",
  "professionalName": "{{professionalName}}",
  "scheduledAt": "{{nurseProfileScheduledAt}}",
  "status": "SCHEDULED",
  "notes": "Criada por enfermeiro para teste de perfil"
}

item.name: Médico cria consulta para paciente visualizar 201
Paciente busca própria consulta por ID 200
Paciente acessa histórico de outro paciente 403
05 - Appointment GraphQL
item.description: Requests GraphQL consolidados para testar criacao, atualizacao, historico, consultas futuras, busca por id e bloqueio de paciente.

body.raw: {"query":"mutation ScheduleAppointment($input: ScheduleAppointmentInput!) { scheduleAppointment(input: $input) { appointmentId patientId professionalId professionalName scheduledAt status notes } }","variables":{"input":{"patientId":"{{patientId}}","professionalId":"{{professionalId}}","professionalName":"{{professionalName}}","scheduledAt":"{{futureScheduledAt}}","status":"SCHEDULED","notes":"{{appointmentNotes}}"}}}

{"query":"mutation UpdateAppointment($appointmentId: ID!, $input: UpdateAppointmentInput!) { updateAppointment(id: $appointmentId, input: $input) { appointmentId patientId professionalId professionalName scheduledAt status notes updatedAt } }","variables":{"appointmentId":"{{graphqlAppointmentId}}","input":{"professionalId":"{{alternateProfessionalId}}","professionalName":"{{alternateProfessionalName}}","scheduledAt":"{{updatedScheduledAt}}","status":"CONFIRMED","notes":"{{updatedAppointmentNotes}}"}}}

{"query":"mutation ScheduleAppointment($input: ScheduleAppointmentInput!) { scheduleAppointment(input: $input) { appointmentId patientId professionalId professionalName scheduledAt status notes } }","variables":{"input":{"patientId":"{{patientId}}","professionalId":"{{alternateProfessionalId}}","professionalName":"{{alternateProfessionalName}}","scheduledAt":"{{nurseScheduledAt}}","status":"SCHEDULED","notes":"Consulta criada por enfermeiro via GraphQL/Postman"}}}

{"query":"query PatientHistory($patientId: ID!) { patientHistory(patientId: $patientId) { patientId appointments { appointmentId patientId professionalId professionalName scheduledAt status notes createdAt updatedAt } } }","variables":{"patientId":"{{patientId}}"}}

{"query":"query FutureAppointments($patientId: ID!) { futureAppointments(patientId: $patientId) { appointmentId patientId professionalId professionalName scheduledAt status notes createdAt updatedAt } }","variables":{"patientId":"{{patientId}}"}}

{"query":"query AppointmentById($appointmentId: ID!) { appointmentById(id: $appointmentId) { appointmentId patientId professionalId professionalName scheduledAt status notes createdAt updatedAt } }","variables":{"appointmentId":"{{graphqlAppointmentId}}"}}
{"query":"query PatientHistory($patientId: ID!) { patientHistory(patientId: $patientId) { patientId appointments { appointmentId status scheduledAt } } }","variables":{"patientId":"{{patientId}}"}}

exec: pm.test('HTTP 200 ou 403 dependendo do tratamento GraphQL', () => pm.expect([200, 403]).to.include(pm.response.code));

body.raw: {"query":"mutation UpdateAppointment($appointmentId: ID!, $input: UpdateAppointmentInput!) { updateAppointment(id: $appointmentId, input: $input) { appointmentId status } }","variables":{"appointmentId":"{{graphqlAppointmentId}}","input":{"status":"SCHEDULED","notes":"Tentativa paciente"}}}
